name: restaurant-mobile-drawer
title: Draco Full-Screen Mobile Drawer
description: Full-screen split-layout mobile drawer: dark left nav panel with logo, tagline, animated nav list with icons and badge pills, and Sign In/Out; right half shows full-bleed food photography. Includes a MobileDrawer variant (classic 280px side-drawer without image panel) and DrawerHeader/Footer/NavSection as reusable sub-components.

preview.reason: Imports Next Image with static paths, @/domains/shared/*, @siso/ui/primitives/buttons, and @supabase/supabase-js User type. Requires Supabase auth and restaurant-app-solo tenant assets. Preserved as code-reference.
